work_unit: fix http-base.js dual credential silent coexistence (PD-M001)
situation: audit-2026-07-03-013 PD-M001 finding: http-base.js L28-36 getHeaders() silently prefers CODE_PRIVATE_TOKEN over DEVOUT_TOKEN when both env vars are set. No warning emitted, masking misconfiguration that could cause auth failures or unintended credential use.
action: Added stderr WARN in getHeaders() when both CODE_PRIVATE_TOKEN and DEVOUT_TOKEN are present. Warning identifies which token wins and suggests unsetting one to silence the warning. Non-blocking (warn-only), preserves existing behavior.
outcome_evidence: git commit 32b9db8 pushed to origin/auto/opt-prod-deploy-1782970212; adds process.stderr.write WARN branch inside getHeaders() when both env vars truthy
next_suggestion: Continue fix-in-progress: dispatch PD-M003 (priority 9, route-fix, resume-next-batch.js observation gate silent skip — add --strict-observation flag)
